Organized religion is a term used a lot in discourse. [[Immanuelle]] and [[Lifeism]] use the term in their own unique way

== History ==
It is a phrase which is often associated with [[antitheism]]. It is unclear where the phrase originated but it is normally critical

[[Immanuelle]] however uses the term in a decidedly positive manner, often emphasizing organization as a virtue. It is more linked to [[religio]] too. Someone can have organized religion solely in their mind

== See Also ==

* [[The Pride]]
* [[Religio]]

[[Category:Religion]]
[[Category:Religio]]
[[sn:Organized religion]][[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Organized religion]][[sn:Organized religion]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
